title: Draw + test the 12-symbol seed set (communication/wayfinding/cultural/safety)
context: The M0 seed set must prove that a symbol can travel the full pipeline end-to-end — concept → drawn → style-lint passed → tested with real users → exported → toward deployment. The seed set must exercise every path, not 12 easy icons: several everyday communication symbols, several wayfinding symbols, at least one culturally-variable concept (to exercise cultural review + regional variant), and at least one safety-aligned symbol (to exercise the stricter comprehension threshold + domain-expert review + disclaimer). Without this, M0 cannot exit and the foundational proof-of-concept is incomplete.
objective: Draw, style-lint, comprehension-test, culturally-review, and export the 12-symbol seed set spanning the four required paths: communication, wayfinding, culturally-variable, and safety-aligned.
acceptanceCriteria: Seed set spans all four required paths: ≥2 everyday communication symbols, ≥2 wayfinding symbols, ≥1 culturally-variable concept (with a documented regional variant), and ≥1 safety-aligned symbol; no trivially easy or arbitrary icon set.
All 12 symbols are original vector geometry; originality attestation recorded in provenance; any permitted visual reference (AIGA/DOT PD) documented; no NC/SA/proprietary source used.
All 12 symbols pass the style-lint gate (grid/stroke/palette/clean-SVG) and export cleanly to SVG/PNG/sprite/OBF with complete metadata records.

At least 1 comprehension pilot run with members of the target population (or, if participant access is not yet available, an honestly-labeled judgement-test pilot); results recorded in comprehensionScore fields with method, n, population, correctPct, and date.

The safety-aligned symbol has domain-expert review recorded in provenance and carries the 'not certified safety signage / not medical advice' disclaimer; at least 1 symbol has completed cultural review and is cleared.
output: symbols/ (12 original SVG source files), metadata/ (12 per-symbol JSON records with comprehension scores and provenance), testing/ (pilot results, de-identified and aggregate), and exports (PNG/sprite/OBF); all CC-BY-4.0. PR opened against main.
